name: learning-platform
description: Learning Platform with React frontend and Express backend

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install
scripts.build:prod: cd client && npm run build -- --mode production
scripts.lint: cd client && npm run lint && cd ../server && npm run lint 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.format: cd client && npm run format 2>/dev/null || true && cd ../server && npm run format 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.test: echo "Run tests from client or server directories"
